LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES ARE IMMEDIATELY ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41(A). DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 20, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties are immediately ordered to meet and confer in person or by telephone in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 20, 2023.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties are immediately ordered to meet and confer in person or by telephone in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 20, 2023.
